About me
Hello there! My name is Ekaterina Jürgens and I am a macroeconomist.
I completed my doctorate at the University of Bamberg. My dissertation, Essays on the Political Economy of Public Investment and Debt, received the Young Scholar Prize of the German Keynes Society (2026).
I am currently a postdoctoral researcher at the University of Mannheim.
In addition, I work at the Macroeconomic Policy Institute (IMK) of the Hans Böckler Foundation in Düsseldorf in a joint project estimating municipal infrastructure investment needs in cooperation with the German Institute for Urban Affairs (difu).

Research interests

Fiscal policy

Public investment

Macroeconomic modelling

Empirical macroeconomics
